raw_consumer_statement: I havent used my card since XX/XX/year> yet I have charges of almost {$2000.00} that I did not make. I spoke with their fraud department and they did nothing. Im still being charged for fraud! I got a call from them today, they put me on hold for a long time, then tell me sorry we cant complete this call that they will call back later? My credit score is spiraling because of this. I am beyond frustrated.
